hotel_name: Inner Peace Phan Thiết (Inner Peace Phan Thiet)

reviews.title: KHÔNG BAO GIỜ QUAY LẠI
reviews.text:
MỘT TRẢI NGHIỆM KHÔNG HỀ VUI VẺ
Sau vài tiếng chạy xe mệt mỏi, thay vì sự niềm nở thì tụi mình được chào đón bằng những lời “không hề thân thiện” của chị lễ tân. 
Vừa tới chưa kịp gạt chân chống xe thì chị nói một lèo về việc để xe bên này bên kia để không chắn lối đi, trong khi tụi mình KHÔNG hề để xe chắn lối đi. Câu chuyện tiếp tục khi vào check-in, mình vừa bước vô tới quầy, chị không cần biết thông tin đặt phòng của khách hay như thế nào thì chị lại xả một tràng nữa về việc 22:30 phải để xe vào để đóng cửa này kia “vì tụi em hết ca về chứ không ở đây”. Chưa kịp nuốt trôi việc đỗ xe, chị lại tiếp tục về việc trên thì thật sự tụi mình muốn bỏ tiền đi chỗ khác ở luôn, nhưng đi xe nhiều giờ quá mệt rồi nên tụi mình đành chấp nhận vào nghỉ. 
Sau đó chị lễ tân này hỏi mình đặt mấy phòng, mình nói 1 phòng thì chị không ngần ngại nói ngay: 1 phòng sao ở 4 người được chị? Mình có bảo chị là tụi mình đặt Fam, thì chị nói KHÔNG có phòng cho 4 người, 4 người phải mua extra bed các thứ. Mình mở thông tin đặt phòng Agoda đưa chị xem thì chị không xem mà vẫn “tra tấn” tụi mình bằng những lời KHÔNG THIỆN CHÍ một chút nào. Sau khi nói thoả lòng mình, chắc có lẽ chị thấy được thông tin booking của mình rồi nên chị nhẹ giọng xuống 1 tông và bây giờ mới mời tụi mình ngồi xuống để chị CHECK lại. Mình đi du lịch nhiều nơi rồi và cũng làm trong ngành dịch vụ, mình không thể nào đồng tình với cách phục vụ của chị này. Lời chào cao hơn mâm cỗ, chị không những không chào mà còn dọn cho tụi mình nguyên một cỗ “lời hay ý đẹp”. Suốt quá trình trên tụi mình không hề được nhận được lời xin lỗi nào của chị, và cũng không thấy được thiện chí sửa lỗi nào của chị, thay vào đó chị chọn cách đổ lỗi cho khách vì khách không hiểu ý chị. 
Vào phòng thì càng bực bội hơn khi nhà vệ sinh trông bẩn và xuống cấp, có khi còn tệ hơn mấy nhà nghỉ rẻ tiền. Dép chuẩn bị cho khách thì chiếc lớn chiếc bé không mang được. Dịch vụ và cơ sở vật chất tệ. Chắc chắn sẽ không bao giờ quay lại.

reviews.title: Nice big rooms with a big pool and right on the Main Street but still quiet
reviews.positives: On the Main Street off the beach, pool was nice and big! Clean and quiet rooms close to restaurants

reviews.title: Not bad but could be better
reviews.text: For the price, it’s alright but the room could have used a cleaning as it smelled quite musty. I would also suggest including bug repellant because we had a couple of cockroaches come in. Additionally, the room did not look anything like the pictures which was probably because it was not part of the main building which looked renovated.

reviews.title: On est parti dès la 1ere nuit.
reviews.positives: Au bord de la route, beaucoup de bruit de camion et de voiture. Concernant la la literie, les matelas sont en béton.

reviews.title: Nice pool and very friendly staff
reviews.text: Good place for a getaway in Mui Ne. The pool is great and very clean. I really liked that the staff were super friendly and helpful. Plus, the kitchen has everything you need to cook, which was very convenient.

reviews.title: Très sympa
reviews.positives: Les extérieurs sont mignons et le personnel est très sympa
reviews.negatives: Les toilettes sont moyennes. La douche direct en face des toilettes c’est pas super pratique mais ça va

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The air-conditioned room is not cool, the TV is broken and cannot be watched, and when I reported to the staff, they said they didn't know how to fix it and also wouldn't change rooms for the guests.

reviews.title: Prima
reviews.negatives: Hele harde bedden, douche onpraktisch en kamer vies.

reviews.title: Worth experiencing
reviews.text: We are very satisfied with the service here, the friendliness, enthusiasm, and always being supported whenever needed. We are very happy with our 2-day stay here 💕

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: hồ bơi sạch ko có mùi javen
reviews.negatives: gia đình mình thuê 2 phòng,1 phòng bị nước yếu,hư ổ khóa.một phòng thì máy sấy tóc cực kỳ yếu nếu ko muốn nói là hư và có mùi rất khó ,ổ cắm thì xa đầu giường

reviews.title: Very nice stay
reviews.text: We loved the pool!!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Khi dặt phòng thì gửi hình view hồ bơi ,đến khi nhận phòng thì đưa lên phòng không khác gì mấy khách sạn giá rẻ 200k 1 đêm ,6h chiều tắm thì mất nước ,mình nhận 3 phòng thì phòng không có quạt ,phòng k có thảm chùi chân ,cửa nhà tắm thì đóng không được ,quá tệ nên phải trả phòng sớm 1 ngày

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Beautiful and clean hotel, convenient location. Friendly and enthusiastic staff. Worth experiencing. 🎉 Additionally, the car rental service is very enthusiastic 10/10.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Phòng không trang bị tủ lạnh, hồ bơi không sạch & không lung linh như trên hình.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The facility is a bit old but it’s ok.  Value for money. The reception very helpful and friendly. Highly recommend for those who just need a place to sleep with good prices.

reviews.title: Không thoải mái
reviews.negatives: Vì đã gọi hỏi rõ việc giá thuê xe máy như thế nào nhưng lúc thanh toán giá lại khác

reviews.title: Traveling to the Mui Ne area
reviews.text: The homestay room is clean, quite spacious, and has amenities such as a hairdryer, TV, and hot water. Especially, the owner is super friendly.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Lúc đặt phòng có hỏi Home bảo cả 2 phòng đều có tủ lạnh nhưng khi nhận có 1 phòng đơn k có tủ lạnh nhưng mọi thứ đều ok

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The location is close to dining areas and nice cafes. The view from the home is quite relaxing and there are two adorable cats. However, the bed is a bit firm; changing the bed would make it perfect. The price is reasonable, I will come back.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Phòng sạch sẽ , thích hợp đi với gia đình , ngay khu đường Nguyễn Đình Chiểu sầm uất, có hồ bơi mini cho trẻ em.

reviews.title: A pleasant place to go alone.
reviews.text: There are 3 rooms with the best view of the pool, so anyone who books should pay attention to choose the right one. I booked a room with a view of the garden, but the lovely staff changed it to a pool view at no extra charge.

reviews.title: Home đẹp có hồ bơi sạch , nhân viên rất thân thiện và hỗ trợ
reviews.positives: Home rất đẹp và nhân viên thân thiện
reviews.negatives: Phòng ko có bàn ủi còn lại rất sạch sẽ

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text: Good clean room hot water and a swimming pool great value for money 👍

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Ks gần biển , đi bộ qua đường là tới , phòng sạch sẽ tiện nghi , giá rẻ . Chủ thân thiện . Lần sau sẽ quay lại !

reviews.title: Review is precious.
reviews.text:
I stayed for 5 days and have no major complaints, but I recommend the second floor for those who value privacy and are picky. Guests can see into windows on the first floor.

The reason I gave a high score here is for two reasons:
1. The staff are very friendly. They helped me when I was confused about the return bus pickup location, treating it like their own responsibility. In the end, they managed to resolve it with the accommodation pickup—good, good!
2. The prices are cheap. If it’s *** thousand won for two people, you can’t complain, haha.

3. There is a rare and curious starfruit tree that you can pick for free, haha.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives:
Homestay được thiết kế tinh tế, mang lại cảm giác ấm cúng và thư giãn. Các chi tiết nhỏ đều được chăm chút kỹ lưỡng, tạo nên một không gian gần gũi với thiên nhiên, đúng với tên gọi “Inner Peace”.
quản lý cực kỳ nhiệt tình và hỗ trợ hết mình. Bọn mình về để quên trang sức lại, anh vẫn hỗ trợ gửi về tận nơi. 100 điểm cho sự thân thiện nhiệt tình 👍👍

reviews.title: I'm going to write a review.
reviews.text:
I stayed for 5 days and had no major complaints, but I recommend the second floor for those who value privacy and are a bit particular. On the first floor, guests can see through the windows.

The reason I gave this place a high score is twofold:
1. The staff are extremely friendly. They helped me as if it were their own job when I was confused about the return bus pickup location. In the end, they resolved it with a pickup from the accommodation, which was great!
2. The price is affordable. If it's *** thousand won for two people, there's really nothing to complain about. Haha!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: It is modern and clean looking. The staff were very responsive to any issues we had and they were fixed very quickly. It was easy to rent a bike and the pool was very nice. Definitely would recommend.

reviews.title: Best
reviews.text:
The price is cheap and it's good for long stays. I stayed in the cheapest room for 5 days without any particular thoughts. I didn't find it uncomfortable, but for sensitive people, I recommend booking a room on the second floor. 

Besides that, the staff are very friendly. I booked a bus to Nha Trang, and when I asked for help because I didn't know the pickup location, they assisted me selflessly as if it were their job, even arranging for the pickup to come to the accommodation. Also, there is a starfruit tree at the accommodation, which is hard to find in Vietnam, so you can taste it for free.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Wonderful property - great value for money and excellent staff who were so friendly. Very clean and good location, very close to the beach. We even received a free upgrade which was amazing!

reviews.title: The room is suitable for all types of tourists.
reviews.text:
I and my group of friends (with young children) are here for just one night because I am combining it with a trip to Phu Quy Island. Although the homestay is not by the beach, it has a clean and lovely swimming pool. 
Our room is a superior room for 2 people with a window, so it's very airy. If anyone prefers a room with a balcony or pool view, they can check out other rooms. I think this room is reasonable for our needs. 
You can walk to the beach and the highly-rated local eateries in the area. 
The homestay also has a kitchen in the back so you can prepare extra food for young children, for example. 
Especially, the owner and the manager are very nice and enthusiastic, and the two cats here are the same 💕

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Friendly staff, clean room. Close to the beach and near check-in spots 🫶🏻. There are also good food options around.

reviews.title: Okay
reviews.text: Getting around between the points is not too far, close to the beach, the swimming pool is quite clean, the room is spacious, clean, and the staff takes good care. The downsides are the old faucet, weak shower water, no dressing table, and no power outlet near the bedside which is very inconvenient, and an old refrigerator. It would be better to fix the charging point right at the head of the bed or have a room with a long extension cord to use.

reviews.title: Valuable
reviews.text: New homestay, everything is set up neatly by the owner. With such prices and location, there's nothing more to discuss. I will stay again if I have the chance to go to Mui Ne.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is clean, the staff is very helpful, and the location is convenient. The downside is that they use solar energy, so there is no hot water during the rainy season, and the restroom is a bit old.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: Nice clean rooms great price with a pool as well 😀

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Nice and clean room hot water with swimming pool great value for money.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: We had a great stay here. Hotel staff were very helpful. Phuong helped us book transport to HCMC and also a jeep tour. Room was clean and hard but comfortable bed. Would stay again. Thank you!

reviews.title: Great place to stay
reviews.text: Loved stay here. Rooms were great for the price and staff really helpful,  especially Nguyễn Thị Bích Phượng.  She help me a lot. Location is really good for me.

reviews.title: Lovely place in heart of Mui Ne
reviews.text: We had such a nice stay at this hotel, it was perfect for what we needed - the pool was lovely too!

reviews.title: Nice place
reviews.text: Cute place-

reviews.title: Highly-recommended place for your vacation
reviews.text: Clean and large room with pool view, warm-hearted staffs

reviews.title: Very nice
reviews.text: Cool cats

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: If you're going to Mui Ne, you should rent Inner Peace Homestay, everything is wonderful. The restaurant and the beach are very convenient to get to from the home.

reviews.title: Good!
reviews.text: The home is enthusiastic, clean, and allowed me to check in early when there was a vacant room!

reviews.title: Highly recommend
reviews.text: Super nice hotel, helpful staff and great facilities. Stayed here for 5 nights during my time in Mui Ne and really enjoyed it

reviews.title: It's suitable for travel here.
reviews.text: The room is clean and always fragrant, the owners and staff are incredibly friendly, always supporting guests upon arrival. If you want to travel economically but need proper accommodation, I find this place very reasonable.

reviews.title: Accommodation
reviews.text: It was an excellent choice to stay. Very good room and the reception was very friendly and helpful!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The home is very lovely, gives a cozy feeling, if you want to experience local life, I highly recommend it. In Mui Ne, this place is close to bars that are open until late because this area has a lot of foreigners, while the resort area seems a bit too quiet, and shops close early. The swimming pool is clean, and everyone is friendly and pleasant, so stay in a room with a pool view.

reviews.title: Best cost-performance.
reviews.text:
Chose this place to quietly rest during a bike tour in southern Vietnam. The price was quite affordable, so I thought the facilities would be lacking, but although a bit old, it was not bad.

Except for the bed mattress being hard and the shower pressure being weak, everything was good. The room size was adequate.

There is a shop selling pho bo and mien ga right next door, and next to that, there is a restaurant selling seafood, so when it rains heavily, I can have meals without going far.

reviews.title: Very chill.
reviews.text: The swimming pool with lights at night is very beautiful, the room is clean, just the right size, the price is reasonable, it has a kitchen and BBQ area suitable for groups, and the lobby is very spacious and cool.

reviews.title: Cute staff
reviews.text: The receptionist here is extremely nice. We checked out and stayed at the reception to wait for our ride back to SG for about 3 hours. He was very helpful. The room is decent for the price, and the mattress is very clean. Overall, we are satisfied.

reviews.title: Very okay.
reviews.text:
The host is friendly, and there is a guitar available for partying. 
At the back of the house, there is a communal playground and a kitchen. 
It is about 300 meters from the house to the beach, going up towards the alley near the plant shop. The beach is clean. 
Depending on the tide, small boats come to shore selling fresh seafood just caught, which is very delicious.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is a bit small, there is no dressing table, but it is very clean, and the owners are friendly and enthusiastic. The cleaning staff is also nice, and it's close to the beach and several restaurants, so it's worth staying here everyone!

reviews.title: Good hotel within the price range.
reviews.text: With this price range, I think there is no other hotel that can surpass this place. The location is quite beautiful, situated on Nguyen Dinh Chieu Street. The interior is somewhat old and a bit outdated, but it is very clean.

reviews.title: Assessment
reviews.text: Our group consists of 8 adults and 1 child, the home space is nice and comfortable. The owner is kind and offers very enthusiastic advice. The prices are reasonable.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is very clean, spacious enough for 2 people. The homestay is cool and right by the beach, the price is very cheap, and the quality for these services is exceptional.
Will come back. The homestay is super cute.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is clean, and the owner of Home is very nice. Come visit Home, everyone, it’s very lovely!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The staffs are really nice and helpful :)) The place is clean and comfortable

reviews.title: Relaxable place!
reviews.text:
I recently stayed at Inner Peace Homestay in Phan Thiet, and it was the perfect choice for my trip. The homestay is a beautiful, white-themed property that immediately gives off a sense of calm and relaxation. It is clean and well equipped. 

The location is also ideal, situated close to local attractions, restaurants, and the beach, making it easy to explore the area without needing much transportation. 

I highly recommend it and would definitely stay here again!

reviews.title: Bien
reviews.text:
La habitación es sencilla pero el lugar muy lindo, zona ajardinada muy bien cuidada y la entrada muy linda. 
Limpio, lo único que el colchón es duro.

reviews.title: Merveilleux
reviews.text: Belle endroit propre, lit très ferme(un peu trop), tranquille comme endroit,personnel sympathique. Location de scooter sur place . Prêt de de plusieurs restos.

reviews.title: Très bien
reviews.text:
Nous avons apprécié notre séjour dans cet hôtel. Très joli, très propre.
Le seul point négatif pour moi a été la literie, matelas beaucoup trop ferme pour moi mais ce n’est que mon avis personnel.

reviews.title: Naja
reviews.text: Sehr einfach. Gibt bessere alternativen

reviews.title: Neue, schöne Unterkunft
reviews.text: Top Unterkunft mit einer schönen Anlage und Pool zu günstigen Preisen.

reviews.title: Non posso consigliarlo
reviews.text: Purtroppo la mia è stata una esperienza negativa e non posso consigliarlo

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Very nice people. There were a lot of mosquitos in one room and they put us in another room when we asked. Thank you. Good place to sleep!

reviews.title: 좋아요
reviews.text: 모기가 좀 많지만 좋아요

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Trãi nghiệm tệ ko như trên các review

reviews.title: Cảm nhận về home
reviews.text: Đến nhân phòng máy lạnh bị hư, phải đợi 2h mới sửa xong. Trong khi đó home nói sẽ tìm cách đền bù bồi thường, nhưng mà khi gặp nhân viên home lại thờ ơ và không đá động gì hết. Phòng cách âm không tốt và có muỗi. Trải nghiệm không tốt!

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Không xứng với số tiền bỏ ra. Ở tạm thôi thì chấp nhận được. Với dịch vụ mình đang có giá tầm 250k tới 300k sẽ hợp lý

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Phòng ốc thì hơi cũ, nhưng sân vườn vs hồ bơi thì mát mẻ

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Được, nên nghỉ ở đây. Ra biển gần, biển đẹp. Xung quanh nhiều hàng quán.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
Отель в целом неплохой, удобно расположен.
Однако при заселении и ещё два дня после в номере стоял отчетливый химический запах. При этом окно не открывалось и не проветривалось. Поменять номер отказались, видимо не было свободных.

Территория крайне маленькая, но уютная. Для долгосрочного пребывания бы не рекомендовала, так как сами номера небольшие, а на территории удобно посидеть тоже место вряд ли найдётся.


При этом для краткосрочного пребывание отель хорошо подходит, есть небольшая парковка для байка, которую закрывают на ночь. 

Персонал отзывчивый и приветливый.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Хороший отель за свои деньги. Номер большой , вот только кровати очень твёрдые.

reviews.title: 值得一住
reviews.text:
一間乾淨的旅宿
外觀也很漂亮
房間如果選面泳池的會更好
美中不足的是露天泳池沒有妥善處理
沒有加氯跟固定撈落葉與昆蟲屍體
